mnemonics.title: Kerberos Steps
mnemonics.content: Always Ask The Great Server (AS-REQ, AS-REP, TGS-REQ, TGS-REP, AP-REQ)

acronyms.usage: Initial credential for obtaining service tickets

visualTips.visualization: Imagine three locked boxes passed between user, TGS, and server with matching keys

analogies.analogy: Like a nightclub: ID check (AS), wristband (TGT), drink ticket (service ticket)
